nasb.text: They will ask for the way to Zion, turning their faces in its direction; they will come that they may join themselves to the Lord  in an everlasting covenant that will not be forgotten.

esv.text: They shall ask the way to Zion, with faces turned toward it, saying, ‘Come, let us join ourselves to the Lord in an everlasting covenant that will never be forgotten.’

cnv.text: 他們要詢問往錫安的路，又面向錫安，說： ‘來吧！我們要以那永不可忘記的約與耶和華連合。’

ccb.text: 他们必打听前往锡安的路，朝锡安走去。他们必凭不会被遗忘的永恒之约归附耶和华。
